form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign post a big 4 len win. Milan G2 November 16 over 1600m in the wet defeating Arnis Master with 56kg at $6.07. First up last campaign third of 9 at Krefeld in the G3 Dr. Busch-Memorial April 27 over 1700m, 7 len behind Namaron with 58kg at $4.70. Looking to others for the winner.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months won by 0.5 len at this track March 29 over 1700m in heavy going defeating Royal Spirit with 63kg at $4.80. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at this track in the G3 Fr?hjahrs-Meile on April 13 over 1600m, nose behind Geography carrying 58kg at $6.30. Strong winning chance.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation ninth of 11 at Saint-Cloud in the LR November 9 over 1600m, in the wet; 21 len behind Trust On carrying 57.5kg at $35. When resuming last campaign fifth of 7 at this track in the G3 G. P. Der Landeshauptstadt D?sseldorf October 5 over 1700m, soft track; 6 len behind Short Final carrying 58kg at $2.90. Win would surprise.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation won by 1.75 len Nottingham LR Ben Marshall Stakes October 29 over 1709m slow track defeating Ebt's Guard carrying 59kg at $3. When resuming last campaign second last of 8 at Sandown Park in the G2 Sandown Mile April 25 over 1609m, 10 len behind Dancing Gemini with 58.5kg at $29. Expecting a bright start to the campaign.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Denied a clear run approaching 1 furlong out.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign second of 11 at Milan in the G3 November 16 over 2200m, on heavy track; 2.5 len behind Atoso with 56.5kg at $7.38. When resuming last campaign third of 7 at Cologne in the LR May 18 over 1850m, 6 len behind Petit Marin with 57kg at $8.50. Cannot make a strong case.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after 10 months 5th of 7 at this track on March 29 over 1700m, on a wet track; 5 len behind Best Lightning with 62.5kg at $4.90. Previously second-up won by 4 len at Munich April 21 over 1600m defeating New Diamond with 61kg at $4. Worth consideration.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at Longchamp in the G2 Prix Dollar October 4 over 1950m, soft track; 14 len behind First Look carrying 56kg at $8. On debut won by 0.8 len Saint-Cloud April 18 over 1600m defeating Eliman carrying 58kg at $6.10. Must be included.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 38 day let-up. Most recently 3rd of 7 at Saint-Cloud in LR on March 5 over 1600m, slow going 4.5 len behind Silius with 57kg at $14. The start before that 2nd of 10 at Cagnes-sur-Mer All Weather in LR on February 15 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind No Lunch with 56.5kg at $12. Plenty to like about his prospects.
